scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.situation: 세계에서 가장 빠른 엘리베이터를 타고 전망대에 오른다
scenes.npcDialog: Taipei 101 was world's tallest until 2010! The elevator reaches 89th floor in 37 seconds. Don't miss the giant wind damper!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 타이페이 101은 2010년까지 세계 최고층이었어요! 엘리베이터가 37초에 89층 도착해요. 거대한 윈드 댐퍼 놓치지 마세요!

choices.text: I want to see the wind damper!

scenes.npcDialog: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial has the changing of the guard every hour! The plaza with Liberty Square Gate is huge. Early morning tai chi is beautiful to watch.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 중정기념당에서 매시간 근위병 교대식이 있어요! 자유광장 문이 있는 광장이 엄청 커요. 이른 아침 태극권 보기 좋아요.

choices.text: I'd love to see the morning tai chi.

scenes.npcDialog: Maokong Gondola goes over tea plantations! Try the glass-bottom cabins for a thrill. Tea farms at the top have amazing views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마오콩 곤돌라가 차밭 위를 지나요! 바닥이 유리인 캐빈으로 스릴을 느껴보세요. 위에 차 농장 전망이 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Tea at a tea farm sounds authentic.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you?

choices.text: I'm looking for work. Are you hiring?
Do you have any job openings?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: The bond is 4 weeks' rent. Any questions?

choices.text: When do I get it back?
Is it refundable if I leave early?

scenes.npcDialog: So you're leaving us. When's your last day?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그럼 그만두시는 거군요. 마지막 날이 언제예요?

choices.text: In two weeks. I'll finish all my duties.
I'm giving 2 weeks' notice as required.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Shilin is Taiwan's biggest night market! Stinky tofu, bubble tea, oyster omelette - all Taiwan classics! Basement food court is the best!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스린은 대만 최대 야시장이에요! 취두부, 버블티, 굴전 - 다 대만 대표 음식! 지하 푸드코트가 제일 좋아요!

choices.text: I have to try stinky tofu!

scenes.npcDialog: Beitou has natural hot springs! Public baths are cheap, or try a fancy hotel spa. The green sulfur spring is unique to here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베이터우에 천연 온천이 있어요! 대중탕은 싸고, 고급 호텔 스파도 있어요. 녹색 유황 온천은 여기만의 특색이에요!

choices.text: Green sulfur springs? I must try!
Hot springs after sightseeing sounds perfect.

scenes.npcDialog: Xinyi District has all the malls! Taipei 101 mall, Breeze, ATT 4 FUN. The rooftop bars have the best city views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 신이 지구에 모든 쇼핑몰이 있어요! 타이페이 101몰, 브리즈, ATT 4 FUN. 루프탑 바에서 도시 전망이 최고예요!

choices.text: Rooftop bar with city views sounds perfect.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here about the job posting?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to submit my resume.
I brought my CV. Who should I give it to?

scenes.npcDialog: Bills are not included in the rent.

choices.text: What bills do I need to pay separately?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help shipping your belongings home?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짐 본국으로 배송하는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much for 2 boxes to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.

scenes.situation: 세계 최대 중국 예술품 컬렉션을 관람한다
scenes.npcDialog: National Palace Museum has 700,000 artifacts! The Jadeite Cabbage is most famous. Too many to display - they rotate every 3 months!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 고궁박물관에는 70만 점의 유물이 있어요! 비취 배추가 제일 유명해요. 너무 많아서 3개월마다 바꿔 전시해요!

choices.text: I must see the Jadeite Cabbage!

scenes.npcDialog: Taiwan invented bubble tea in 1988! Choose your sugar and ice level - we customize everything. Black sugar fresh milk is trending now!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 대만이 1988년 버블티를 발명했어요! 당도와 얼음 양을 고르세요 - 다 맞춤이에요. 흑설탕 생우유가 요즘 인기예요!

choices.text: Bubble tea from where it was invented!

scenes.npcDialog: Taiwanese breakfast is unique! Egg crepe - danbing - with soy milk. Sweet or salty soy milk? Locals love salty with fried bread!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 대만식 아침은 독특해요! 달걀 크레이프 - 단빙 - 에 두유. 달콤한 두유 짭짤한 두유? 현지인은 짭짤한 거에 튀긴 빵을 좋아해요!

choices.text: I'll try it the local way - salty!
Egg crepe for breakfast? I'm curious.
Soy milk for breakfast is weird.

scenes.npcDialog: Thanks for coming in. Tell me about yourself.

choices.text: I'm from Korea and I'm on a working holiday visa.
I have experience in customer service.
I don't like talking about myself.
What do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to set up home internet?

choices.text: How fast is your standard plan?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need before you go?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가기 전에 더 필요한 거 있으세요?

choices.text: Could you write me a reference letter?
May I use you as a reference for future jobs?
You have to write me a good review.

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: Din Tai Fung started here in Taipei! Our xiaolongbao have exactly 18 folds each. Careful - the soup inside is hot!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 딘타이펑은 타이베이에서 시작됐어요! 샤오롱바오에 정확히 18개 주름이 있어요. 조심하세요 - 안에 뜨거운 육수가 있어요!

choices.text: I'll be careful with the hot soup.

scenes.npcDialog: Yangmingshan has volcanic landscapes! Steam vents, hot springs, flower seasons. In March the cherry blossoms are stunning!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 양밍산에는 화산 지형이 있어요! 증기 분출구, 온천, 꽃 축제. 3월 벚꽃이 장관이에요!

choices.text: Nature so close to the city is perfect.
I prefer staying in the city.

scenes.situation: 옛 철도가 된 하이킹 코스를 걷는다
scenes.npcDialog: Shifen is famous for sky lanterns! Write your wish, light it, and watch it float away. The old train street is also unique!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스펀은 천등으로 유명해요! 소원 쓰고, 불 붙이고, 날아가는 거 보세요. 옛 기차 거리도 독특해요!

choices.text: Releasing a sky lantern with my wish!
The train track street looks so unique.
Sky lanterns are bad for environment.

scenes.npcDialog: What hours are you available to work?

choices.text: I'm flexible. I can work weekends too.
I prefer mornings, but I can adjust.
I only work 2 hours a day.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: I need a cheap bed and desk.

scenes.npcDialog: We'll miss you! When are you leaving?

choices.text: Next week. Thank you for everything!
I'll really miss you all. Let's keep in touch!

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?

scenes.situation: 센과 치히로의 배경이 된 마을을 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: Jiufen inspired Spirited Away! The red lanterns at night are magical. Try taro balls and tea in the old teahouses!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 지우펀은 센과 치히로에 영감을 줬어요! 밤에 빨간 등불이 마법 같아요. 전통 찻집에서 토란 경단과 차 드세요!

choices.text: Red lanterns at night sounds magical.

scenes.npcDialog: Yongkang Street is hipster heaven! Boutiques, cafes, mango shaved ice. The original Din Tai Fung is here too!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 용캉제는 힙스터 천국이에요! 부티크, 카페, 망고 빙수. 딘타이펑 원조 매장도 여기 있어요!

scenes.npcDialog: Baoan Temple won UNESCO Asia-Pacific Heritage Award! The roof decorations are incredible. Free traditional puppet shows on weekends!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 바오안 궁은 유네스코 아시아태평양 유산상을 받았어요! 지붕 장식이 끝내줘요. 주말에 무료 전통 인형극도 해요!

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about the position?
Are you interested in this item?

choices.text: Yes, can I see it in person first?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.

scenes.npcDialog: Taipei MRT is super clean! No eating or drinking allowed. Get EasyCard for all transport and convenience stores too!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 타이베이 MRT는 정말 깨끗해요! 음식 음료 금지예요. 이지카드 사면 교통에 편의점에서도 써요!

scenes.npcDialog: Longshan Temple is from 1738! Very sacred to locals. You can try moon blocks for fortune telling - toss them and ask your question!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 룽산사는 1738년 것이에요! 현지인들에게 매우 신성해요. 달 블록으로 점을 봐요 - 던지면서 질문하세요!

choices.text: I'd love to try the fortune telling!

scenes.situation: 대만의 국민 음식 소고기 국수를 먹는다
scenes.npcDialog: Beef noodle soup is Taiwan's national dish! Hours of slow-cooking. Braised or clear broth? Add pickled vegetables for authentic taste!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 우육면은 대만 국민 음식이에요! 몇 시간 푹 끓여요. 조림 국물 아님 맑은 국물? 절임 채소 넣으면 진짜 맛!

choices.text: Taiwan's national dish? I must try!
I'll try the braised broth version.
Soup noodles are too hot in this weather.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to register for tax?

choices.text: Yes, I just started working. What do I need?
How do I get a tax file number?
I don't want to pay taxes.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you registering as a new patient?

choices.text: Yes, I just moved here. What documents do I need?
Do you accept my working holiday insurance?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Valet parking is for lazy people.

scenes.npcDialog: Raohe is more local than Shilin! The pepper pork bun at the entrance is famous - 30 minute line but worth it! Try snake soup if you dare!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라오허는 스린보다 로컬이에요! 입구 후추 돼지고기 빵이 유명해요 - 30분 줄이지만 가치 있어요! 용기 있으면 뱀탕도 드세요!

choices.text: 30 minutes for a bun? Must be amazing!
I want the authentic local experience.
I don't wait that long for food.

scenes.npcDialog: Taiwan's chicken rice is different from Hainan! Shredded chicken on rice with special sauce. Add a bowl of bamboo soup - perfect combo!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 대만 닭고기밥은 하이난식과 달라요! 찢은 닭고기에 특제 소스. 죽순 스프 추가하면 완벽 조합!

scenes.npcDialog: What type of account would you like to open?

choices.text: A basic checking account for my salary.
I need an account to receive my wages.
Just put cash in my hand.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to apply for a visa extension.
What are the requirements for extending my visa?

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
Why would I pay for that?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a long-term rental?

choices.text: Yes, I'll be here for about a year.
I want a mansion for cheap.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you filing for a tax return?

choices.text: Yes, I'm leaving the country soon.
How do I claim my tax back?
Give me all my money back.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
